transcript.final_response:
Modified files and replacement counts:

- `/src/main.py` — 2 replacements  
- `/src/tests/test_utils.py` — 2 replacements  
- `/src/utils.py` — 2 replacements
tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
if [ ! -d /src ]; then
  echo "/src directory not found" >&2
  exit 1
fi

find /src -type f -name '*.py' -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
  count=$(awk '{c+=gsub(/\<getData\>/,"fetchRecords")} END{print c+0}' "$file")
  if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then
    tmp=$(mktemp)
    sed 's/\<getData\>/fetchRecords/g' "$file" > "$tmp"
    mv "$tmp" "$file"
    echo "$file $count"
  fi
done

if [ ! -d /src ]; then
  echo "NO_SRC"
  ls -la /
  exit 0
fi
find /src -type f -name '*.py' | head -n 5

set -u
find /src -type f -name '*.py' -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
  count=$(grep -o -w 'getData' "$file" | wc -l)
  if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then
    tmp=$(mktemp)
    sed 's/\<getData\>/fetchRecords/g' "$file" > "$tmp"
    mv "$tmp" "$file"
    echo "$file $count"
  fi
done

set -e
find /src -type f -name '*.py' | while IFS= read -r file; do
  count=$(awk '{c+=gsub(/\<getData\>/,"fetchRecords")} END{print c+0}' "$file")
  if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then
    tmp=$(mktemp)
    awk '{gsub(/\<getData\>/,"fetchRecords")}1' "$file" > "$tmp"
    mv "$tmp" "$file"
    echo "$file $count"
  fi
done
